title: aotus mollis
intro: Aotus mollis, also known as the Velvet Tree or Velvet-leaf, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aotus mollis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Aotus mollis is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
